headline: Global Communications Director - Talon / ex-Publicis / ex-Dentsu

experiences.title: Director Of Communications
experiences.description:
As a Board Member reporting directly to the CEO and working alongside 7 other C-Suite ExCo board members, I have the privilege of leading the communications and marketing function, as well as overseeing our talented in-house design team. Responsible developing comprehensive communication and marketing strategies for Publicis Media and its sub-brands, including Zenith, Starcom, Spark Foundry, Performics, PMX, and Publicis Commerce. In addition to these responsibilities, I also take charge of all internal communications and employee engagement initiatives for our 1800-strong workforce. 

As a member of Publicis Groupe UK's Top 50 Senior Leadership Team, I strive to uphold the company's values and vision in all that I do.

experiences.title: Communications & Marketing Director, UK & Ireland
experiences.description: Reporting to the CEO, I was promoted to lead the corporate communications and marketing function for Dentsu and its sub-brands including Carat, iProspect, DentsuX, Vizeum and Isobar. I oversaw a team accountable for Employee Engagement, External Communications and PR, Events, Digital Marketing, Thought Leadership and Social Impact.

experiences.title: Head of Corporate Communications, UK & Ireland
experiences.description: As Head of Corporate Communications, I oversaw a small team focussed on external comms and PR.

experiences.title: Co Chair
experiences.description: During my time at Dentsu, I helped set up and launch the LGBT+ employee resource group, called '&Proud'. As Co-Chair, I led a passionate group of volunteers from across the business, representing many agencies, to ensure that LGBT+ people can be open, authentic and true to themselves; with the knowledge that they will be treated fairly, respectfully and as equals.

recommendations:
Silvia de Candia

Mandy and I worked together at Dentsu Aegis Network, where we were both part of the PR and Comms team for the advertising group. Mandy is an extremely talented professional. Her creativity, originality and media awareness always stood out and delivered really inspiring and successful work. I found in Mandy a great mentor and a warm person to work with (and sit next to!). I miss her and I hope our career paths will cross again in the future!

Lydia Oakes

I worked with Mandy indirectly in my role as Head of Marketing for iProspect, part of Dentsu Aegis. Her strong leadership and collaborative approach ensure the success of the projects she leads. As well as being a highly skilled PR and Communications professional, Mandy is an abolute pleasure to work with.
